    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cd /home/dell/ai-track-metrosense && mkdir -p server/scripts && cat > server/scripts/load_metrosense_dataset.py <<'PY'\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\n\\nimport argparse\\nimport csv\\nimport json\\nfrom collections import defaultdict\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\\nfrom datetime import datetime\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\nfrom typing import Any\\n\\nfrom sqlalchemy import text\\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import create_async_engine\\n\\nfrom app.core.config import SERVER_DIR, get_settings\\n\\nDATASET_DIR = SERVER_DIR / \\\"DataSet_MetroSense\\\"\\nDOCUMENTS_DIR = SERVER_DIR / \\\"Documents_Metrosense\\\"\\nIST = datetime.now().astimezone().tzinfo\\n\\nDATASET_TABLE_ORDER = [\\n    \\\"air_quality_observation\\\",\\n    \\\"weather_observation\\\",\\n    \\\"flood_incident\\\",\\n    \\\"power_outage_event\\\",\\n    \\\"traffic_segment_observation\\\",\\n    \\\"lake_hydrology\\\",\\n    \\\"ward_profile\\\",\\n    \\\"lake_reference\\\",\\n    \\\"location_master\\\",\\n]\\n\\nCSV_TABLES = {\\n    \\\"air_quality_observations.csv\\\": \\\"air_quality_observation\\\",\\n    \\\"weather_observations.csv\\\": \\\"weather_observation\\\",\\n    \\\"flood_incidents.csv\\\": \\\"flood_incident\\\",\\n    \\\"power_outage_events.csv\\\": \\\"power_outage_event\\\",\\n    \\\"traffic_segment_observations.csv\\\": \\\"traffic_segment_observation\\\",\\n    \\\"lake_hydrology.csv\\\": \\\"lake_hydrology\\\",\\n}\\n\\nLAKE_NAME_BY_ID = {\\n    \\\"lake_001\\\": \\\"Bellandur\\\",\\n    \\\"lake_002\\\": \\\"Varthur\\\",\\n    \\\"lake_003\\\": \\\"Hebbal\\\",\\n    \\\"lake_004\\\": \\\"Nagavara\\\",\\n    \\\"lake_005\\\": \\\"KR Puram\\\",\\n    \\\"lake_006\\\": \\\"Madiwala\\\",\\n}\\n\\n\\n@dataclass\\nclass FactReferences:\\n    location_ids: set[str]\\n    ward_ids: set[str]\\n    lake_ids: set[str]\\n\\n\\nclass LoaderValidationError(RuntimeError):\\n    pass\\n\\n\\ndef _parse_timestamp(value: str | None) -> datetime | None:\\n    if not value:\\n        return None\\n    dt = datetime.fromisoformat(value)\\n    if dt.tzinfo is None:\\n        if IST is None:\\n            raise RuntimeError(\\\"Unable to determine local timezone for IST normalization\\\")\\n        return dt.replace(tzinfo=IST)\\n    return dt\\n\\n\\ndef _to_bool(value: str | None) -> bool | None:\\n    if value is None or value == \\\"\\\":\\n        return None\\n    low = value.lower()\\n    if low == \\\"true\\\":\\n        return True\\n    if low == \\\"false\\\":\\n        return False\\n    raise LoaderValidationError(f\\\"Unexpected boolean literal: {value}\\\")\\n\\n\\ndef _to_float(value: str | None) -> float | None:\\n    if value is None or value == \\\"\\\":\\n        return None\\n    return float(value)\\n\\n\\ndef _to_int(value: str | None) -> int | None:\\n    if value is None or value == \\\"\\\":\\n        return None\\n    return int(value)\\n\\n\\ndef _norm(value: str) -> str:\\n    return \\\" \\\".join(value.strip().split()).lower()\\n\\n\\ndef _display_name_from_zone(zone_id: str) -> str:\\n    if not zone_id.startswith(\\\"zone_\\\"):\\n        return zone_id\\n    return zone_id.replace(\\\"zone_\\\", \\\"\\\").replace(\\\"_\\\", \\\" \\\").title()\\n\\n\\ndef _load_document_names() -> set[str]:\\n    names: set[str] = set()\\n    for index_file in DOCUMENTS_DIR.glob(\\\"*_index.json\\\"):\\n        payload = json.loads(index_file.read_text())\\n        names.update(payload.get(\\\"wards_covered\\\", []))\\n        for section in payload.get(\\\"table_of_contents\\\", []):\\n            names.update(section.get(\\\"wards_mentioned\\\", []))\\n    return names\\n\\n\\ndef _collect_references() -> tuple[FactReferences, dict[str, str], dict[str, str]]:\\n    location_ids: set[str] = set()\\n    ward_ids: set[str] = set()\\n    lake_ids: set[str] = set()\\n    ward_name_by_id: dict[str, str] = {}\\n    zone_name_by_ward_id: dict[str, str] = {}\\n\\n    for csv_name in CSV_TABLES:\\n        with (DATASET_DIR / csv_name).open(newline=\\\"\\\") as handle:\\n            reader = csv.DictReader(handle)\\n            for row in reader:\\n                location = (row.get(\\\"location_id\\\") or \\\"\\\").strip()\\n                if location:\\n                    location_ids.add(location)\\n\\n                ward = (row.get(\\\"ward_id\\\") or \\\"\\\").strip()\\n                if ward:\\n                    ward_ids.add(ward)\\n\\n                lake = (row.get(\\\"lake_id\\\") or \\\"\\\").strip()\\n                if lake:\\n                    lake_ids.add(lake)\\n\\n                if csv_name == \\\"air_quality_observations.csv\\\":\\n                    if ward and location and not ward.startswith(\\\"zone_\\\"):\\n _validate_location_coverage(location_rows: list[dict[str, Any]], refs: FactReferences) -> None:\\n    canonical_ids = {row[\\\"location_id\\\"] for row in location_rows}\\n    missing_locations = transformed[\\\"rainfall_intensity_mm_hr\\\"] = _to_float(row.get(\\\"rainfall_intensity_mm_hr\\\"))\\n        transformed[\\\"visibility_km\\\"] = _to_float(row.get(\\\"visibility_km\\\"))\\n        transformed[\\\"latitude\\\"] = _to_float(row.get(\\\"latitude\\\"))\\n        transformed[\\\"longitude\\\"] = _to_float(row.get(\\\"longitude\\\"))\\n\\n    elif table_name == \\\"air_quality_observation\\\":\\n        transformed[\\\"observed_at\\\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\\\"observed_at\\\"])\\n        transformed[\\\"ingested_at\\\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\\\"ingested_at\\\"])\\n        for col in [\\\"pm2_5\\\", \\\"pm10\\\", \\\"no2\\\", \\\"so2\\\", \\\"co\\\", \\\"ozone\\\", \\\"nh3\\\", \\\"latitude\\\", \\\"longitude\\\"]:\\n transformed[col] = _to_float(row.get(col))\\n\\n    elif table_name == \\\"traffic_segment_observation\\\":\\n        transformed[\\\"observed_at\\\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\\\"observed_at\\\"])\\n transformed[\\\"resolved_at\\\"] = _parse_timestamp(row.get(\\\"resolved_at\\\"))\\n        for col in [\\n            \\\"latitude\\\",\\n            \\\"longitude\\\",\\n col in [\\n            \\\"road_blocked_flag\\\",\\n            \\\"vehicles_stranded_flag\\\",\\n            \\\"property_damage_flag\\\",\\n            \\\"pump_deployed_flag\\\",\\n        ]:\\n            transformed[col] = _to_bool(row.get(col))\\n\\n    return transformed\\n\\n\\nasync def _insert_rows(conn, table_name: str, rows: list[dict[str, Any]], batch_size: int = 5000) -> int:\\n    if not rows:\\n        return 0\\n\\n    columns = list(rows[0].keys())\\n    col_sql = \\\", \\\".join(columns)\\n    value_sql = \\\", \\\".join(f\\\":{col}\\\" for col in columns)\\n    statement = text(f\\\"INSERT INTO {table_name} ({col_sql}) VALUES ({value_sql})\\\")\\n\\n    inserted = 0\\n    for start in range(0, len(rows), batch_size):\\n        batch = rows[start : start + batch_size]\\n        await conn.execute(statement, batch)\\n        inserted += len(batch)\\n    return inserted\\n\\n\\nasync def _load_csv_table(conn, csv_name: str, table_name: str, batch_size: int = 5000) -> int:\\n    inserted = 0\\n    batch: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\\n\\n    with (DATASET_DIR / csv_name).open(newline=\\\"\\\") as handle:\\n        reader = csv.DictReader(handle)\\n        for row in reader:\\n            batch.append(_transform_row(table_name, row))\\n            if len(batch) >= batch_size:\\n                inserted += await _insert_rows(conn, table_name, batch, batch_size=batch_size)\\n                batch = []\\n\\n    if batch:\\n        inserted += await _insert_rows(conn, table_name, batch, batch_size=batch_size)\\n\\n    return inserted\\n\\n\\nasync def run_loader(replace: bool, simulate_failure_after_truncate: bool = False) -> dict[str, int]:\\n    settings = get_settings()\\n    engine = create_async_engine(settings.effective_db_url)\\n\\n    refs, ward_name_by_id, zone_name_by_ward_id = _collect_references()\\n    location_rows = _build_location_rows(refs, ward_name_by_id, zone_name_by_ward_id)\\n    _validate_location_coverage(location_rows, refs)\\n    ward_profile_rows = _build_ward_profile_rows(refs.ward_ids)\\n    lake_reference_rows = _build_lake_reference_rows(refs.lake_ids)\\n\\n    # Explicit diagnostics before SQL FKs fire to highlight normalization issues.\\n    lake_reference_ids = {row[\\\"lake_id\\\"] for row in lake_reference_rows}\\n    missing_lakes = sorted(refs.lake_ids - lake_reference_ids)\\n    if missing_lakes:\\n        raise LoaderValidationError(f\\\"Missing lake_reference rows for lake_ids: {missing_lakes[:20]}\\\")\\n\\n    inserted_counts: defaultdict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\\n\\n    async with engine.begin() as conn:\\n        await conn.execute(text(\\\"SET LOCAL TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata'\\\"))\\n        if replace:\\n            truncate_sql = \\\"TRUNCATE TABLE \\\" + \\\", \\\".join(DATASET_TABLE_ORDER) + \\\" RESTART IDENTITY\\\"\\n            await conn.execute(text(truncate_sql))\\n\\n        if simulate_failure_after_truncate:\\n            raise RuntimeError(\\\"Simulated loader failure after truncate\\\")\\n\\n        inserted_counts[\\\"location_master\\\"] = await _insert_rows(\\n            conn,\\n \\\"ward_profile\\\",\\n            ward_profile_rows,\\n            batch_size=2000,\\n        )\\n        inserted_counts[\\\"lake_reference\\\"] = await _insert_rows(\\n            conn,\\n            \\\"lake_reference\\\",\\n            lake_reference_rows,\\n            batch_size=2000,\\n        )\\n\\n        for csv_name, table_name in CSV_TABLES.items():\\n            inserted_counts[table_name] = await _load_csv_table(conn, csv_name, table_name)\\n\\n    await engine.dispose()\\n    return dict(inserted_counts)\\n\\n\\ndef _parse_args() -> argparse.Namespace:\\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\\\"Load MetroSense golden CSV dataset into Postgres\\\")\\n    parser.add_argument(\\n        \\\"--replace\\\",\\n        action=\\\"store_true\\\",\\n        help=\\\"Truncate dataset tables before loading so DB mirrors golden CSVs\\\",\\n    )\\n    parser.add_argument(\\n        \\\"--simulate-failure-after-truncate\\\",\\n        action=\\\"store_true\\\",\\n        help=\\\"Crash after truncate to validate transaction rollback behavior\\\",\\n    )\\n    return parser.parse_args()\\n\\n\\ndef main() -> None:\\n    args = _parse_args()\\n    if not args.replace:\\n        raise SystemExit(\\\"Refusing to run without --replace. This loader is designed for golden data replacement.\\\")\\n\\n    import asyncio\\n\\n    inserted = asyncio.run(\\n        run_loader(\\n            replace=args.replace,\\n            simulate_failure_after_truncate=args.simulate_failure_after_truncate,\\n        )\\n    )\\n    print(json.dumps(inserted, sort_keys=True))\\n\\n\\nif __name__ == \\\"__main__\\\":\\n    main()\\nPY\"}",

\\\"neighborhood_name\\\": neighborhood_name,\\n                \\\"pin_code\\\": None,\\n                \\\"latitude\\\": None,\\n                \\\"longitude\\\": None,\\n                \\\"geometry\\\": None,\\n                \\\"created_at\\\": now,\\n                \\\"updated_at\\\": now,\\n            }\\n        )\\n\\n    return rows\\n\\n\\ndef _build_ward_profile_rows(ward_ids: set[str]) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:\\n    return [\\n        {\\n            \\\"profile_id\\\": f\\\"profile_{ward_id}\\\",\\n            \\\"ward_id\\\": ward_id,\\n            \\\"population_density\\\": None,\\n            \\\"elderly_population_pct\\\": None,\\n            \\\"children_population_pct\\\": None,\\n            \\\"slum_household_count\\\": None,\\n            \\\"green_cover_pct\\\": None,\\n            \\\"impervious_surface_pct\\\": None,\\n            \\\"data_year\\\": None,\\n            \\\"source_name\\\": \\\"Documents_Metrosense\\\",\\n        }\\n        for ward_id in sorted(ward_ids)\\n    ]\\n\\n\\ndef _build_lake_reference_rows(lake_ids: set[str]) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:\\n    rows: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\\n    for lake_id in sorted(lake_ids):\\n        lake_name = LAKE_NAME_BY_ID.get(lake_id, lake_id)\\n        rows.append(\\n            {\\n                \\\"lake_id\\\": lake_id,\\n                \\\"lake_name\\\": lake_name,\\n                \\\"lake_type\\\": None,\\n                \\\"location_id\\\": lake_name if lake_name in LAKE_NAME_BY_ID.values() else None,\\n                \\\"ward_id\\\": None,\\n                \\\"latitude\\\": None,\\n                \\\"longitude\\\": None,\\n                \\\"catchment_area_sqkm\\\": None,\\n                \\\"lake_area_sqkm\\\": None,\\n                \\\"full_tank_level_meters\\\": None,\\n                \\\"max_capacity_mcm\\\": None,\\n                \\\"number_of_gates\\\": None,\\n                \\\"source_name\\\": \\\"Documents_Metrosense\\\",\\n            }\\n        )\\n    return rows\\n\\n\\ndef _validate_location_coverage(location_rows: list[dict[str, Any]], refs: FactReferences) -> None:\\n    canonical_ids = {row[\\\"location_id\\\"] for row in location_rows}\\n    missing_locations = sorted(refs.location_ids - canonical_ids)\\n    missing_wards = sorted(refs.ward_ids - canonical_ids)\\n\\n    if missing_locations or missing_wards:\\n        detail = {\\n            \\\"missing_location_ids\\\": missing_locations[:20],\\n            \\\"missing_ward_ids\\\": missing_wards[:20],\\n            \\\"missing_location_count\\\": len(missing_locations),\\n            \\\"missing_ward_count\\\": len(missing_wards),\\n        }\\n        raise LoaderValidationError(\\n            \\\"Location normalization failed coverage check: \\\" + json.dumps(detail, sort_keys=True)\\n        )\\n\\n\\ndef _transform_row(table_name: str, row: dict[str, str]) -> dict[str, Any]:\\n    transformed = {key: (value if value != \\\"\\\" else None) for key, value in row.items()}\\n\\n    if table_name == \\\"weather_observation\\\":\\n        transformed[\\\"observed_at\\\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\\\"observed_at\\\"])\\n        transformed[\\\"ingested_at\\\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\\\"ingested_at\\\"])\\n        transformed[\\\"elevation_meters\\\"] = _to_float(row.get(\\\"elevation_meters\\\"))\\n        transformed[\\\"temperature_celsius\\\"] = _to_float(row.get(\\\"temperature_celsius\\\"))\\n        transformed[\\\"humidity_percent\\\"] = _to_float(row.get(\\\"humidity_percent\\\"))\\n        transformed[\\\"pressure_hpa\\\"] = _to_float(row.get(\\\"pressure_hpa\\\"))\\n        transformed[\\\"wind_speed_kmh\\\"] = _to_float(row.get(\\\"wind_speed_kmh\\\"))\\n        transformed[\\\"wind_gust_kmh\\\"] = _to_float(row.get(\\\"wind_gust_kmh\\\"))\\n        transformed[\\\"wind_direction_degrees\\\"] = _to_int(row.get(\\\"wind_direction_degrees\\\"))\\n        transformed[\\\"rainfall_mm_hourly\\\"] = _to_float(row.get(\\\"rainfall_mm_hourly\\\"))\\n        transformed[\\\"rainfall_mm_24hour\\\"] = _to_float(row.get(\\\"rainfall_mm_24hour\\\"))\\n        transformed[\\\"rainfall_intensity_mm_hr\\\"] = _to_float(row.get(\\\"rainfall_intensity_mm_hr\\\"))\\n        transformed[\\\"visibility_km\\\"] = _to_float(row.get(\\\"visibility_km\\\"))\\n        transformed[\\\"latitude\\\"] = _to_float(row.get(\\\"latitude\\\"))\\n        transformed[\\\"longitude\\\"] = _to_float(row.get(\\\"longitude\\\"))\\n\\n    elif table_name == \\\"air_quality_observation\\\":\\n        transformed[\\\"observed_at\\\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\\\"observed_at\\\"])\\n        transformed[\\\"ingested_at\\\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\\\"ingested_at\\\"])\\n        for col in [\\\"pm2_5\\\", \\\"pm10\\\", \\\"no2\\\", \\\"so2\\\", \\\"co\\\", \\\"ozone\\\", \\\"nh3\\\", \\\"latitude\\\", \\\"longitude\\\"]:\\n            transformed[col] = _to_float(row.get(col))\\n        transformed[\\\"aqi_value\\\"] = _to_int(row.get(\\\"aqi_value\\\"))\\n\\n    elif table_name == \\\"lake_hydrology\\\":\\n        transformed[\\\"observed_at\\\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\\\"observed_at\\\"])\\n        transformed[\\\"ingested_at\\\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\\\"ingested_at\\\"])\\n        for col in [\\n            \\\"water_level_meters\\\",\\n            \\\"fill_percentage\\\",\\n            \\\"inflow_cusecs\\\",\\n            \\\"outflow_cusecs\\\",\\n            \\\"surplus_flow_cusecs\\\",\\n            \\\"rainfall_last_1h_mm\\\",\\n            \\\"rainfall_last_24h_mm\\\",\\n        ]:\\n            transformed[col] = _to_float(row.get(col))\\n        transformed[\\\"overflow_status\\\"] = _to_bool(row.get(\\\"overflow_status\\\"))\\n        transformed[\\\"encroachment_risk_flag\\\"] = _to_bool(row.get(\\\"encroachment_risk_flag\\\"))\\n        transformed[\\\"siltation_risk_flag\\\"] = _to_bool(row.get(\\\"siltation_risk_flag\\\"))\\n        transformed[\\\"number_of_gates_open\\\"] = _to_int(row.get(\\\"number_of_gates_open\\\"))\\n\\n    elif table_name == \\\"power_outage_event\\\":\\n        transformed[\\\"started_at\\\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\\\"started_at\\\"])\\n        transformed[\\\"restored_at\\\"] = _parse_timestamp(row.get(\\\"restored_at\\\"))\\n        transformed[\\\"duration_minutes\\\"] = _to_int(row.get(\\\"duration_minutes\\\"))\\n        transformed[\\\"affected_customers\\\"] = _to_int(row.get(\\\"affected_customers\\\"))\\n        transformed[\\\"critical_load_affected_flag\\\"] = _to_bool(row.get(\\\"critical_load_affected_flag\\\"))\\n        for col in [\\n            \\\"wind_speed_kmh_at_time\\\",\\n            \\\"wind_gust_kmh_at_time\\\",\\n            \\\"rainfall_mm_1h_at_time\\\",\\n            \\\"rainfall_mm_24h_at_time\\\",\\n        ]:\\n            transformed[col] = _to_float(row.get(col))\\n\\n    elif table_name == \\\"traffic_segment_observation\\\":\\n        transformed[\\\"observed_at\\\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\\\"observed_at\\\"])\\n        transformed[\\\"ingested_at\\\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\\\"ingested_at\\\"])\\n        transformed[\\\"lanes_count\\\"] = _to_int(row.get(\\\"lanes_count\\\"))\\n        for col in [\\n            \\\"speed_limit_kmh\\\",\\n            \\\"avg_speed_kmh\\\",\\n            \\\"free_flow_speed_kmh\\\",\\n            \\\"travel_time_minutes\\\",\\n            \\\"free_flow_travel_time_minutes\\\",\\n            \\\"delay_minutes\\\",\\n            \\\"congestion_index\\\",\\n            \\\"heavy_vehicle_share\\\",\\n            \\\"rainfall_mm_1h_at_time\\\",\\n            \\\"rainfall_mm_3h_at_time\\\",\\n        ]:\\n            transformed[col] = _to_float(row.get(col))\\n        transformed[\\\"waterlogging_flag\\\"] = _to_bool(row.get(\\\"waterlogging_flag\\\"))\\n\\n    elif table_name == \\\"flood_incident\\\":\\n        transformed[\\\"reported_at\\\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\\\"reported_at\\\"])\\n        transformed[\\\"resolved_at\\\"] = _parse_timestamp(row.get(\\\"resolved_at\\\"))\\n        for col in [\\n            \\\"latitude\\\",\\n            \\\"longitude\\\",\\n            \\\"water_depth_cm\\\",\\n            \\\"rainfall_mm_1h_at_time\\\",\\n            \\\"rainfall_mm_3h_at_time\\\",\\n        ]:\\n            transformed[col] = _to_float(row.get(col))\\n        for col in [\\n            \\\"road_blocked_flag\\\",\\n            \\\"vehicles_stranded_flag\\\",\\n            \\\"property_damage_flag\\\",\\n            \\\"pump_deployed_flag\\\",\\n        ]:\\n            transformed[col] = _to_bool(row.get(col))\\n\\n    return transformed\\n\\n\\nasync def _insert_rows(conn, table_name: str, rows: list[dict[str, Any]], batch_size: int = 5000) -> int:\\n    if not rows:\\n        return 0\\n\\n    columns = list(rows[0].keys())\\n    col_sql = \\\", \\\".join(columns)\\n    value_sql = \\\", \\\".join(f\\\":{col}\\\" for col in columns)\\n    statement = text(f\\\"INSERT INTO {table_name} ({col_sql}) VALUES ({value_sql})\\\")\\n\\n    inserted = 0\\n    for start in range(0, len(rows), batch_size):\\n        batch = rows[start : start + batch_size]\\n        await conn.execute(statement, batch)\\n        inserted += len(batch)\\n    return inserted\\n\\n\\nasync def _load_csv_table(conn, csv_name: str, table_name: str, batch_size: int = 5000) -> int:\\n    inserted = 0\\n    batch: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\\n\\n    with (DATASET_DIR / csv_name).open(newline=\\\"\\\") as handle:\\n        reader = csv.DictReader(handle)\\n        for row in reader:\\n            batch.append(_transform_row(table_name, row))\\n            if len(batch) >= batch_size:\\n                inserted += await _insert_rows(conn, table_name, batch, batch_size=batch_size)\\n                batch = []\\n\\n    if batch:\\n        inserted += await _insert_rows(conn, table_name, batch, batch_size=batch_size)\\n\\n    return inserted\\n\\n\\nasync def run_loader(replace: bool, simulate_failure_after_truncate: bool = False) -> dict[str, int]:\\n    settings = get_settings()\\n    engine = create_async_engine(settings.effective_db_url)\\n\\n    refs, ward_name_by_id, zone_name_by_ward_id = _collect_references()\\n    location_rows = _build_location_rows(refs, ward_name_by_id, zone_name_by_ward_id)\\n    _validate_location_coverage(location_rows, refs)\\n    ward_profile_rows = _build_ward_profile_rows(refs.ward_ids)\\n    lake_reference_rows = _build_lake_reference_rows(refs.lake_ids)\\n\\n    # Explicit diagnostics before SQL FKs fire to highlight normalization issues.\\n    lake_reference_ids = {row[\\\"lake_id\\\"] for row in lake_reference_rows}\\n    missing_lakes = sorted(refs.lake_ids - lake_reference_ids)\\n    if missing_lakes:\\n        raise LoaderValidationError(f\\\"Missing lake_reference rows for lake_ids: {missing_lakes[:20]}\\\")\\n\\n    inserted_counts: defaultdict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\\n\\n    async with engine.begin() as conn:\\n        await conn.execute(text(\\\"SET LOCAL TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata'\\\"))\\n        if replace:\\n            truncate_sql = \\\"TRUNCATE TABLE \\\" + \\\", \\\".join(DATASET_TABLE_ORDER) + \\\" RESTART IDENTITY\\\"\\n            await conn.execute(text(truncate_sql))\\n\\n        if simulate_failure_after_truncate:\\n            raise RuntimeError(\\\"Simulated loader failure after truncate\\\")\\n\\n        inserted_counts[\\\"location_master\\\"] = await _insert_rows(\\n            conn,\\n            \\\"location_master\\\",\\n            location_rows,\\n            batch_size=2000,\\n        )\\n        inserted_counts[\\\"ward_profile\\\"] = await _insert_rows(\\n            conn,\\n            \\\"ward_profile\\\",\\n            ward_profile_rows,\\n            batch_size=2000,\\n        )\\n        inserted_counts[\\\"lake_reference\\\"] = await _insert_rows(\\n            conn,\\n            \\\"lake_reference\\\",\\n            lake_reference_rows,\\n            batch_size=2000,\\n        )\\n\\n        for csv_name, table_name in CSV_TABLES.items():\\n            inserted_counts[table_name] = await _load_csv_table(conn, csv_name, table_name)\\n\\n    await engine.dispose()\\n    return dict(inserted_counts)\\n\\n\\ndef _parse_args() -> argparse.Namespace:\\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\\\"Load MetroSense golden CSV dataset into Postgres\\\")\\n    parser.add_argument(\\n        \\\"--replace\\\",\\n        action=\\\"store_true\\\",\\n        help=\\\"Truncate dataset tables before loading so DB mirrors golden CSVs\\\",\\n    )\\n    parser.add_argument(\\n        \\\"--simulate-failure-after-truncate\\\",\\n        action=\\\"store_true\\\",\\n        help=\\\"Crash after truncate to validate transaction rollback behavior\\\",\\n    )\\n    return parser.parse_args()\\n\\n\\ndef main() -> None:\\n    args = _parse_args()\\n    if not args.replace:\\n        raise SystemExit(\\\"Refusing to run without --replace. This loader is designed for golden data replacement.\\\")\\n\\n    import asyncio\\n\\n    inserted = asyncio.run(\\n        run_loader(\\n            replace=args.replace,\\n            simulate_failure_after_truncate=args.simulate_failure_after_truncate,\\n        )\\n    )\\n    print(json.dumps(inserted, sort_keys=True))\\n\\n\\nif __name__ == \\\"__main__\\\":\\n    main()\\nPY\"}",
    "call_id": "call_Uc5Io7F8vCaHLsCMNvlp5Pl3"
  }
}

    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: /home/dell/ai-track-metrosense/server/scripts/load_metrosense_dataset.py\n@@\n from collections import defaultdict\n from dataclasses import dataclass\n from datetime import datetime\n from pathlib import Path\n from typing import Any\n+from zoneinfo import ZoneInfo\n@@\n-IST = datetime.now().astimezone().tzinfo\n+IST = ZoneInfo(\"Asia/Kolkata\")\n@@\n     if not value:\n         return None\n     dt = datetime.fromisoformat(value)\n     if dt.tzinfo is None:\n-        if IST is None:\n-            raise RuntimeError(\"Unable to determine local timezone for IST normalization\")\n         return dt.replace(tzinfo=IST)\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}
```

-> tuple[Path, Path]:\n    dataset_dir = tmp_path / \"DataSet_MetroSense\"\n    docs_dir = tmp_path / \"Documents_Metrosense\"\n    dataset_dir.mkdir(parents=True)\n    docs_dir.mkdir(parents=True)\n\n    for name, body in CSV_FIXTURES.items():\n        (dataset_dir / name).write_text(body.replace('\"\\n    \"', \"\"))\n\n    index_payload = {\n        \"document_id\": \"test-doc\",\n        \"wards_covered\": [\"Hebbal\", \"Bellandur\", \"Varthur\"],\n        \"table_of_contents\": [{\"wards_mentioned\": [\"Hebbal\", \"Nagavara\"]}],\n    }\n    (docs_dir / \"test_index.json\").write_text(json.dumps(index_payload))\n    return dataset_dir, docs_dir\n\n\n@pytest.mark.asyncio\nasync def test_loader_replace_and_idempotent(db: AsyncSession, tmp_path: Path, monkeypatch: pytest.MonkeyPatch) -> None:\n    dataset_dir, docs_dir = _write_golden_fixture(tmp_path)\n    monkeypatch.setattr(loader, \"DATASET_DIR\", dataset_dir)\n    monkeypatch.setattr(loader, \"DOCUMENTS_DIR\", docs_dir)\n\n    first = await loader.run_loader(replace=True)\n    second = await loader.run_loader(replace=True)\n\n    assert first == second\n\n    row_count = (\n        await db.execute(text(\"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM air_quality_observation\"))\n    ).scalar_one()\n    assert row_count == 1\n\n    location_count = (await db.execute(text(\"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM location_master\"))).scalar_one()\n    assert location_count >= 3\n\n\n@pytest.mark.asyncio\nasync def test_loader_rollback_on_midrun_failure(\n    db: AsyncSession,\n    tmp_path: Path,\n    monkeypatch: pytest.MonkeyPatch,\n) -> None:\n    dataset_dir, docs_dir = _write_golden_fixture(tmp_path)\n    monkeypatch.setattr(loader, \"DATASET_DIR\", dataset_dir)\n    monkeypatch.setattr(loader, \"DOCUMENTS_DIR\", docs_dir)\n\n    await db.execute(\n        text(\n            \"\"\"\n            INSERT INTO location_master (\n                location_id, canonical_name, location_type, aliases,\n                ward_id, ward_name, zone_name, neighborhood_name,\n                pin_code, latitude, longitude, geometry, created_at, updated_at\n            ) VALUES (\n                'sentinel_loc', 'Sentinel Location', 'ward', '[]'::json,\n                NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL,\n                NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NOW(), NOW()\n            )\n            \"\"\"\n        )\n    )\n    await db.commit()\n\n    with pytest.raises(RuntimeError, match=\"Simulated loader failure\"):\n        await loader.run_loader(replace=True, simulate_failure_after_truncate=True)\n\n    sentinel = (\n        await db.execute(\n            text(\"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM location_master WHERE location_id = 'sentinel_loc'\")\n        )\n    ).scalar_one()\n    assert sentinel == 1\n\n\n@pytest.mark.asyncio\nasync def test_location_validation_reports_missing_ids() -> None:\n    refs = loader.FactReferences(location_ids={\"A\", \"B\"}, ward_ids={\"ward_1\"}, lake_ids=set())\n    valid = [{\"location_id\": \"A\"}, {\"location_id\": \"ward_1\"}]\n\n    with pytest.raises(loader.LoaderValidationError, match=\"missing_location_count\"):\n        loader._validate_location_coverage(valid, refs)\n"
  }

rows: list[dict[str, Any]], batch_size: int = 5000\n) -> int:\n    if not rows:\n        return 0\n\n    columns = list(rows[0].keys())\n    col_sql = \", \".join(columns)\n    value_sql = \", \".join(f\":{col}\" for col in columns)\n    statement = text(f\"INSERT INTO {table_name} ({col_sql}) VALUES ({value_sql})\")\n\n    inserted = 0\n    for start in range(0, len(rows), batch_size):\n        batch = rows[start : start + batch_size]\n        await conn.execute(statement, batch)\n        inserted += len(batch)\n    return inserted\n\n\nasync def _load_csv_table(conn, csv_name: str, table_name: str, batch_size: int = 5000) -> int:\n    inserted = 0\n    batch: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\n\n    with (DATASET_DIR / csv_name).open(newline=\"\") as handle:\n        reader = csv.DictReader(handle)\n        for row in reader:\n            batch.append(_transform_row(table_name, row))\n            if len(batch) >= batch_size:\n                inserted += await _insert_rows(conn, table_name, batch, batch_size=batch_size)\n                batch = []\n\n    if batch:\n        inserted += await _insert_rows(conn, table_name, batch, batch_size=batch_size)\n\n    return inserted\n\n\nasync def run_loader(\n    replace: bool, simulate_failure_after_truncate: bool = False\n) -> dict[str, int]:\n    settings = get_settings()\n    engine = create_async_engine(settings.effective_db_url)\n\n    refs, ward_name_by_id, zone_name_by_ward_id = _collect_references()\n    location_rows = _build_location_rows(refs, ward_name_by_id, zone_name_by_ward_id)\n    _validate_location_coverage(location_rows, refs)\n    ward_profile_rows = _build_ward_profile_rows(refs.ward_ids)\n    lake_reference_rows = _build_lake_reference_rows(refs.lake_ids, refs.location_ids)\n\n    # Explicit diagnostics before SQL FKs fire to highlight normalization issues.\n    lake_reference_ids = {row[\"lake_id\"] for row in lake_reference_rows}\n    missing_lakes = sorted(refs.lake_ids - lake_reference_ids)\n    if missing_lakes:\n        raise LoaderValidationError(\n            f\"Missing lake_reference rows for lake_ids: {missing_lakes[:20]}\"\n        )\n\n    inserted_counts: defaultdict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\n\n    async with engine.begin() as conn:\n        await conn.execute(text(\"SET LOCAL TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata'\"))\n        if replace:\n            truncate_sql = \"TRUNCATE TABLE \" + \", \".join(DATASET_TABLE_ORDER) + \" RESTART IDENTITY\"\n            await conn.execute(text(truncate_sql))\n"
  }
}

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-11T06:02:52.392Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_qBD0n9hpu6araKNFJrwdAxsg",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: /home/dell/ai-track-metrosense/server/scripts/load_metrosense_dataset.py\n@@\n     for location_id in sorted(refs.location_ids):\n         if location_id in refs.ward_ids:\n             continue\n \n+        loc_ward_id: str | None = None\n+        loc_ward_name: str | None = None\n+        loc_zone_name: str | None = None\n+        loc_neighborhood_name: str | None = None\n+\n         if location_id.startswith(\"zone_\"):\n             canonical = _display_name_from_zone(location_id)\n             loc_type = \"zone\"\n-            ward_id: str | None = None\n-            ward_name: str | None = None\n-            zone_name: str | None = location_id\n-            neighborhood_name: str | None = None\n+            loc_zone_name = location_id\n         else:\n             normalized = _norm(location_id)\n             canonical = canonical_name_by_norm.get(normalized, location_id)\n             loc_type = \"neighborhood\"\n-            ward_id = None\n-            ward_name = None\n-            zone_name = None\n-            neighborhood_name = canonical\n+            loc_neighborhood_name = canonical\n \n         rows.append(\n             {\n                 \"location_id\": location_id,\n                 \"canonical_name\": canonical,\n                 \"location_type\": loc_type,\n                 \"aliases\": sorted({canonical, location_id}),\n-                \"ward_id\": ward_id,\n-                \"ward_name\": ward_name,\n-                \"zone_name\": zone_name,\n-                \"neighborhood_name\": neighborhood_name,\n+                \"ward_id\": loc_ward_id,\n+                \"ward_name\": loc_ward_name,\n+                \"zone_name\": loc_zone_name,\n+                \"neighborhood_name\": loc_neighborhood_name,\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}
```

lake_ids: set[str],\n   252\t    known_location_ids: set[str],\n   253\t) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:\n   254\t    rows: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\n   255\t    for lake_id in sorted(lake_ids):\n   256\t        lake_name = LAKE_NAME_BY_ID.get(lake_id, lake_id)\n   257\t        rows.append(\n   258\t            {\n   259\t                \"lake_id\": lake_id,\n   260\t                \"lake_name\": lake_name,\n   261\t                \"lake_type\": None,\n   262\t                \"location_id\": lake_name if lake_name in known_location_ids else None,\n   263\t                \"ward_id\": None,\n   264\t                \"latitude\": None,\n   265\t                \"longitude\": None,\n   266\t                \"catchment_area_sqkm\": None,\n   267\t                \"lake_area_sqkm\": None,\n   268\t                \"full_tank_level_meters\": None,\n   269\t                \"max_capacity_mcm\": None,\n   270\t                \"number_of_gates\": None,\n   271\t                \"source_name\": \"Documents_Metrosense\",\n   272\t            }\n   273\t        )\n   274\t    return rows\n   275\t\n   276\t\n   277\tdef _validate_location_coverage(location_rows: list[dict[str, Any]], refs: FactReferences) -> None:\n   278\t    canonical_ids = {row[\"location_id\"] for row in location_rows}\n   279\t    missing_locations = sorted(refs.location_ids - canonical_ids)\n   280\t    missing_wards = sorted(refs.ward_ids - canonical_ids)\n   281\t\n   282\t    if missing_locations or missing_wards:\n   283\t        detail = {\n   284\t            \"missing_location_ids\": missing_locations[:20],\n   285\t            \"missing_ward_ids\": missing_wards[:20],\n   286\t            \"missing_location_count\": len(missing_locations),\n   287\t            \"missing_ward_count\": len(missing_wards),\n   288\t        }\n   289\t        raise LoaderValidationError(\n   290\t            \"Location normalization failed coverage check: \" + json.dumps(detail, sort_keys=True)\n   291\t        )\n   292\t\n   293\t\n   294\tdef _transform_row(table_name: str, row: dict[str, str]) -> dict[str, Any]:\n   295\t    transformed: dict[str, Any] = {\n   296\t        key: (value if value != \"\" else None) for key, value in row.items()\n   297\t    }\n   298\t\n   299\t    if table_name == \"weather_observation\":\n   300\t        transformed[\"observed_at\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\"observed_at\"])\n   301\t        transformed[\"ingested_at\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\"ingested_at\"])\n   302\t        transformed[\"elevation_meters\"] = _to_float(row.get(\"elevation_meters\"))\n   303\t        transformed[\"temperature_celsius\"] = _to_float(row.get(\"temperature_celsius\"))\n   304\t        transformed[\"humidity_percent\"] = _to_float(row.get(\"humidity_percent\"))\n   305\t        transformed[\"pressure_hpa\"] = _to_float(row.get(\"pressure_hpa\"))\n   306\t        transformed[\"wind_speed_kmh\"] = _to_float(row.get(\"wind_speed_kmh\"))\n   307\t        transformed[\"wind_gust_kmh\"] = _to_float(row.get(\"wind_gust_kmh\"))\n   308\t        transformed[\"wind_direction_degrees\"] = _to_int(row.get(\"wind_direction_degrees\"))\n   309\t        transformed[\"rainfall_mm_hourly\"] = _to_float(row.get(\"rainfall_mm_hourly\"))\n   310\t        transformed[\"rainfall_mm_24hour\"] = _to_float(row.get(\"rainfall_mm_24hour\"))\n   311\t        transformed[\"rainfall_intensity_mm_hr\"] = _to_float(row.get(\"rainfall_intensity_mm_hr\"))\n   312\t        transformed[\"visibility_km\"] = _to_float(row.get(\"visibility_km\"))\n   313\t        transformed[\"latitude\"] = _to_float(row.get(\"latitude\"))\n   314\t        transformed[\"longitude\"] = _to_float(row.get(\"longitude\"))\n   315\t\n   316\t    elif table_name == \"air_quality_observation\":\n   317\t        transformed[\"observed_at\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\"observed_at\"])\n   318\t        transformed[\"ingested_at\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\"ingested_at\"])\n   319\t        for col in [\"pm2_5\", \"pm10\", \"no2\", \"so2\", \"co\", \"ozone\", \"nh3\", \"latitude\", \"longitude\"]:\n   320\t            transformed[col] = _to_float(row.get(col))\n   321\t        transformed[\"aqi_value\"] = _to_int(row.get(\"aqi_value\"))\n   322\t\n   323\t    elif table_name == \"lake_hydrology\":\n   324\t        transformed[\"observed_at\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\"observed_at\"])\n   325\t        transformed[\"ingested_at\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\"ingested_at\"])\n   326\t        for col in [\n   327\t            \"water_level_meters\",\n   328\t            \"fill_percentage\",\n   329\t            \"inflow_cusecs\",\n   330\t            \"outflow_cusecs\",\n   331\t            \"surplus_flow_cusecs\",\n   332\t            \"rainfall_last_1h_mm\",\n   333\t            \"rainfall_last_24h_mm\",\n   334\t        ]:\n   335\t            transformed[col] = _to_float(row.get(col))\n   336\t        transformed[\"overflow_status\"] = _to_bool(row.get(\"overflow_status\"))\n   337\t        transformed[\"encroachment_risk_flag\"] = _to_bool(row.get(\"encroachment_risk_flag\"))\n   338\t        transformed[\"siltation_risk_flag\"] = _to_bool(row.get(\"siltation_risk_flag\"))\n   339\t        transformed[\"number_of_gates_open\"] = _to_int(row.get(\"number_of_gates_open\"))\n   340\t\n   341\t    elif table_name == \"power_outage_event\":\n   342\t        transformed[\"started_at\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\"started_at\"])\n   343\t        transformed[\"restored_at\"] = _parse_timestamp(row.get(\"restored_at\"))\n   344\t        transformed[\"duration_minutes\"] = _to_int(row.get(\"duration_minutes\"))\n   345\t        transformed[\"affected_customers\"] = _to_int(row.get(\"affected_customers\"))\n   346\t        transformed[\"critical_load_affected_flag\"] = _to_bool(\n   347\t            row.get(\"critical_load_affected_flag\")\n   348\t        )\n   349\t        for col in [\n   350\t            \"wind_speed_kmh_at_time\",\n   351\t            \"wind_gust_kmh_at_time\",\n   352\t            \"rainfall_mm_1h_at_time\",\n   353\t            \"rainfall_mm_24h_at_time\",\n   354\t        ]:\n   355\t            transformed[col] = _to_float(row.get(col))\n   356\t\n   357\t    elif table_name == \"traffic_segment_observation\":\n   358\t        transformed[\"observed_at\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\"observed_at\"])\n   359\t        transformed[\"ingested_at\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\"ingested_at\"])\n   360\t        transformed[\"lanes_count\"] = _to_int(row.get(\"lanes_count\"))\n   361\t        for col in [\n   362\t            \"speed_limit_kmh\",\n   363\t            \"avg_speed_kmh\",\n   364\t            \"free_flow_speed_kmh\",\n   365\t            \"travel_time_minutes\",\n   366\t            \"free_flow_travel_time_minutes\",\n   367\t            \"delay_minutes\",\n   368\t            \"congestion_index\",\n   369\t            \"heavy_vehicle_share\",\n   370\t            \"rainfall_mm_1h_at_time\",\n   371\t            \"rainfall_mm_3h_at_time\",\n   372\t        ]:\n   373\t            transformed[col] = _to_float(row.get(col))\n   374\t        transformed[\"waterlogging_flag\"] = _to_bool(row.get(\"waterlogging_flag\"))\n   375\t\n   376\t    elif table_name == \"flood_incident\":\n   377\t        transformed[\"reported_at\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\"reported_at\"])\n   378\t        transformed[\"resolved_at\"] = _parse_timestamp(row.get(\"resolved_at\"))\n   379\t        for col in [\n   380\t            \"latitude\",\n   381\t            \"longitude\",\n   382\t            \"water_depth_cm\",\n   383\t            \"rainfall_mm_1h_at_time\",\n   384\t            \"rainfall_mm_3h_at_time\",\n   385\t        ]:\n   386\t            transformed[col] = _to_float(row.get(col))\n   387\t        for col in [\n   388\t            \"road_blocked_flag\",\n   389\t            \"vehicles_stranded_flag\",\n   390\t            \"property_damage_flag\",\n   391\t            \"pump_deployed_flag\",\n   392\t        ]:\n   393\t            transformed[col] = _to_bool(row.get(col))\n   394\t\n   395\t    return transformed\n   396\t\n   397\t\n   398\tasync def _insert_rows(\n   399\t    conn: AsyncConnection,\n   400\t    table_name: str,\n   401\t    rows: list[dict[str, Any]],\n   402\t    batch_size: int = 5000,\n   403\t) -> int:\n   404\t    if not rows:\n   405\t        return 0\n   406\t\n   407\t    columns = list(rows[0].keys())\n   408\t    col_sql = \", \".join(columns)\n   409\t    value_sql = \", \".join(f\":{col}\" for col in columns)\n   410\t    statement = text(f\"INSERT INTO {table_name} ({col_sql}) VALUES ({value_sql})\")\n   411\t\n   412\t    inserted = 0\n   413\t    for start in range(0, len(rows), batch_size):\n   414\t        raw_batch = rows[start : start + batch_size]\n   415\t        batch: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\n   416\t        for row in raw_batch:\n   417\t            normalized_row: dict[str, Any] = {}\n   418\t            for key, value in row.items():\n   419\t                if isinstance(value, (list, dict)):\n   420\t                    normalized_row[key] = json.dumps(value)\n   421\t                else:\n   422\t                    normalized_row[key] = value\n   423\t            batch.append(normalized_row)\n   424\t        await conn.execute(statement, batch)\n   425\t        inserted += len(batch)\n   426\t    return inserted\n   427\t\n   428\t\n   429\tasync def _load_csv_table(\n   430\t    conn: AsyncConnection,\n   431\t    csv_name: str,\n   432\t    table_name: str,\n   433\t    batch_size: int = 5000,\n   434\t) -> int:\n   435\t    inserted = 0\n   436\t    batch: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\n   437\t\n   438\t    with (DATASET_DIR / csv_name).open(newline=\"\") as handle:\n   439\t        reader = csv.DictReader(handle)\n   440\t        for row in reader:\n   441\t            batch.append(_transform_row(table_name, row))\n   442\t            if len(batch) >= batch_size:\n   443\t                inserted += await _insert_rows(conn, table_name, batch, batch_size=batch_size)\n   444\t                batch = []\n   445\t\n   446\t    if batch:\n   447\t        inserted += await _insert_rows(conn, table_name, batch, batch_size=batch_size)\n   448\t\n   449\t    return inserted\n   450\t\n   451\t\n   452\tasync def run_loader(\n   453\t    replace: bool, simulate_failure_after_truncate: bool = False\n   454\t) -> dict[str, int]:\n   455\t    settings = get_settings()\n   456\t    engine = create_async_engine(settings.effective_db_url)\n   457\t\n   458\t    refs, ward_name_by_id, zone_name_by_ward_id = _collect_references()\n   459\t    location_rows = _build_location_rows(refs, ward_name_by_id, zone_name_by_ward_id)\n   460\t    _validate_location_coverage(location_rows, refs)\n   461\t    ward_profile_rows = _build_ward_profile_rows(refs.ward_ids)\n   462\t    lake_reference_rows = _build_lake_reference_rows(refs.lake_ids, refs.location_ids)\n   463\t\n   464\t    # Explicit diagnostics before SQL FKs fire to highlight normalization issues.\n   465\t    lake_reference_ids = {row[\"lake_id\"] for row in lake_reference_rows}\n   466\t    missing_lakes = sorted(refs.lake_ids - lake_reference_ids)\n   467\t    if missing_lakes:\n   468\t        raise LoaderValidationError(\n   469\t            f\"Missing lake_reference rows for lake_ids: {missing_lakes[:20]}\"\n   470\t        )\n   471\t\n   472\t    inserted_counts: defaultdict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\n   473\t\n   474\t    async with engine.begin() as conn:\n   475\t        await conn.execute(text(\"SET LOCAL TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata'\"))\n   476\t        if replace:\n   477\t            truncate_sql = \"TRUNCATE TABLE \" + \", \".join(DATASET_TABLE_ORDER) + \" RESTART IDENTITY\"\n   478\t            await conn.execute(text(truncate_sql))\n   479\t\n   480\t        if simulate_failure_after_truncate:\n   481\t            raise RuntimeError(\"Simulated loader failure after truncate\")\n   482\t\n   483\t        inserted_counts[\"location_master\"] = await _insert_rows(\n   484\t            conn,\n   485\t            \"location_master\",\n   486\t            location_rows,\n   487\t            batch_size=2000,\n   488\t        )\n   489\t        inserted_counts[\"ward_profile\"] = await _insert_rows(\n   490\t            conn,\n   491\t            \"ward_profile\",\n   492\t            ward_profile_rows,\n   493\t            batch_size=2000,\n   494\t        )\n   495\t        inserted_counts[\"lake_reference\"] = await _insert_rows(\n   496\t            conn,\n   497\t            \"lake_reference\",\n   498\t            lake_reference_rows,\n   499\t            batch_size=2000,\n   500\t        )\n   501\t\n   502\t        for csv_name, table_name in CSV_TABLES.items():\n   503\t            inserted_counts[table_name] = await _load_csv_table(conn, csv_name, table_name)\n   504\t\n   505\t    await engine.dispose()\n   506\t    return dict(inserted_counts)\n   507\t\n   508\t\n   509\tdef _parse_args() -> argparse.Namespace:\n   510\t    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\"Load MetroSense golden CSV dataset into Postgres\")\n   511\t    parser.add_argument(\n   512\t        \"--replace\",\n   513\t        action=\"store_true\",\n   514\t        help=\"Truncate dataset tables before loading so DB mirrors golden CSVs\",\n   515\t return dt\n    70\t\n    71\t\n    72\tdef _to_bool(value: str | None) -> bool | None:\n    73\t    if value is None or value == \"\":\n    74\t        return None\n    75\t    low = value.lower()\n    76\t    if low == \"true\":\n    77\t        return True\n    78\t    if low == \"false\":\n    79\t        return False\n    80\t    raise LoaderValidationError(f\"Unexpected boolean literal: {value}\")\n    81\t\n    82\t\n    83\tdef _to_float(value: str | None) -> float | None:\n    84\t    if value is None or value == \"\":\n    85\t        return None\n    86\t    return float(value)\n    87\t\n    88\t\n    89\tdef _to_int(value: str | None) -> int | None:\n    90\t    if value is None or value == \"\":\n    91\t        return None\n    92\t    return int(value)\n    93\t\n    94\t\n    95\tdef _norm(value: str) -> str:\n    96\t    return \" \".join(value.strip().split()).lower()\n    97\t\n    98\t\n    99\tdef _display_name_from_zone(zone_id: str) -> str:\n   100\t    if not zone_id.startswith(\"zone_\"):\n   101\t        return zone_id\n   102\t    return zone_id.replace(\"zone_\", \"\").replace(\"_\", \" \").title()\n   103\t\n   104\t\n   105\tdef _load_document_names() -> set[str]:\n   106\t    names: set[str] = set()\n   107\t    for index_file in DOCUMENTS_DIR.glob(\"*_index.json\"):\n   108\t        payload = json.loads(index_file.read_text())\n   109\t        names.update(payload.get(\"wards_covered\", []))\n   110\t        for section in payload.get(\"table_of_contents\", []):\n   111\t            names.update(section.get(\"wards_mentioned\", []))\n   112\t    return names\n   113\t\n   114\t\n   115\tdef _collect_references() -> tuple[FactReferences, dict[str, str], dict[str, str]]:\n   116\t    location_ids: set[str] = set()\n   117\t    ward_ids: set[str] = set()\n   118\t    lake_ids: set[str] = set()\n   119\t    ward_name_by_id: dict[str, str] = {}\n   120\t    zone_name_by_ward_id: dict[str, str] = {}\n   121\t\n   122\t    for csv_name in CSV_TABLES:\n   123\t        with (DATASET_DIR / csv_name).open(newline=\"\") as handle:\n   124\t            reader = csv.DictReader(handle)\n   125\t            for row in reader:\n   126\t                location = (row.get(\"location_id\") or \"\").strip()\n   127\t                if location:\n   128\t                    location_ids.add(location)\n   129\t\n   130\t                ward = (row.get(\"ward_id\") or \"\").strip()\n   131\t                if ward:\n   132\t                    ward_ids.add(ward)\n   133\t\n   134\t                lake = (row.get(\"lake_id\") or \"\").strip()\n   135\t                if lake:\n   136\t                    lake_ids.add(lake)\n   137\t\n   138\t                if csv_name == \"air_quality_observations.csv\":\n   139\t                    if ward and location and not ward.startswith(\"zone_\"):\n   140\t                        ward_name_by_id[ward] = location\n   141\t\n   142\t                if csv_name == \"flood_incidents.csv\":\n   143\t                    if ward and (row.get(\"neighborhood_name\") or \"\").strip():\n   144\t                        ward_name_by_id.setdefault(ward, row[\"neighborhood_name\"].strip())\n   145\t\n   146\t                if csv_name == \"power_outage_events.csv\":\n   147\t                    if ward and (row.get(\"zone_name\") or \"\").strip():\n   148\t                        zone_name_by_ward_id[ward] = row[\"zone_name\"].strip()\n   149\t\n   150\t    return (\n   151\t        FactReferences(location_ids=location_ids, ward_ids=ward_ids, lake_ids=lake_ids),\n   152\t        ward_name_by_id,\n   153\t        zone_name_by_ward_id,\n   154\t    )\n   155\t\n   156\t\n   157\tdef _build_location_rows(\n   158\t    refs: FactReferences,\n   159\t    ward_name_by_id: dict[str, str],\n   160\t    zone_name_by_ward_id: dict[str, str],\n   161\t) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:\n   162\t    now = datetime.now().astimezone()\n   163\t    all_known_names = _load_document_names()\n   164\t    canonical_name_by_norm = {_norm(name): name for name in all_known_names}\n   165\t    rows: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\n   166\t\n   167\t    for ward_id in sorted(refs.ward_ids):\n   168\t        ward_name = ward_name_by_id.get(ward_id)\n   169\t        zone_name = zone_name_by_ward_id.get(ward_id)\n   170\t        canonical = ward_name or ward_id\n   171\t        alias_set = {canonical, ward_id.replace(\"_\", \" \")}\n   172\t        rows.append(\n   173\t            {\n   174\t                \"location_id\": ward_id,\n   175\t                \"canonical_name\": canonical,\n   176\t                \"location_type\": \"ward\",\n   177\t                \"aliases\": sorted(alias_set),\n   178\t                \"ward_id\": ward_id,\n   179\t                \"ward_name\": ward_name,\n   180\t                \"zone_name\": zone_name,\n   181\t                \"neighborhood_name\": ward_name,\n   182\t                \"pin_code\": None,\n   183\t                \"latitude\": None,\n   184\t                \"longitude\": None,\n   185\t                \"geometry\": None,\n   186\t                \"created_at\": now,\n   187\t                \"updated_at\": now,\n   188\t            }\n   189\t        )\n   190\t\n   191\t    for location_id in sorted(refs.location_ids):\n   192\t        if location_id in refs.ward_ids:\n   193\t            continue\n   194\t\n   195\t        loc_ward_id: str | None = None\n   196\t        loc_ward_name: str | None = None\n   197\t        loc_zone_name: str | None = None\n   198\t        loc_neighborhood_name: str | None = None\n   199\t\n   200\t        if location_id.startswith(\"zone_\"):\n   201\t            canonical = _display_name_from_zone(location_id)\n   202\t            loc_type = \"zone\"\n   203\t            loc_zone_name = location_id\n   204\t        else:\n   205\t            normalized = _norm(location_id)\n   206\t            canonical = canonical_name_by_norm.get(normalized, location_id)\n   207\t            loc_type = \"neighborhood\"\n   208\t            loc_neighborhood_name = canonical\n   209\t\n   210\t        rows.append(\n   211\t            {\n   212\t                \"location_id\": location_id,\n   213\t                \"canonical_name\": canonical,\n   214\t                \"location_type\": loc_type,\n   215\t                \"aliases\": sorted({canonical, location_id}),\n   216\t                \"ward_id\": loc_ward_id,\n   217\t                \"ward_name\": loc_ward_name,\n   218\t                \"zone_name\": loc_zone_name,\n   219\t                \"neighborhood_name\": loc_neighborhood_name,\n   220\t                \"pin_code\": None,\n   220\t                \"pin_code\": None,\n   221\t                \"latitude\": None,\n   222\t                \"longitude\": None,\n   223\t                \"geometry\": None,\n   224\t                \"created_at\": now,\n   225\t                \"updated_at\": now,\n   226\t            }\n   227\t        )\n   228\t\n   229\t    return rows\n   230\t\n   231\t\n   232\tdef _build_ward_profile_rows(ward_ids: set[str]) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:\n   233\t    return [\n   234\t        {\n   235\t            \"profile_id\": f\"profile_{ward_id}\",\n   236\t            \"ward_id\": ward_id,\n   237\t            \"population_density\": None,\n   238\t            \"elderly_population_pct\": None,\n   239\t            \"children_population_pct\": None,\n   240\t            \"slum_household_count\": None,\n   241\t            \"green_cover_pct\": None,\n   242\t            \"impervious_surface_pct\": None,\n   243\t            \"data_year\": None,\n   244\t            \"source_name\": \"Documents_Metrosense\",\n   245\t        }\n   246\t        for ward_id in sorted(ward_ids)\n   247\t    ]\n   248\t\n   249\t\n   250\tdef _build_lake_reference_rows(\n   251\t    lake_ids: set[str],\n   252\t    known_location_ids: set[str],\n   253\t) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:\n   254\t    rows: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\n   255\t    for lake_id in sorted(lake_ids):\n   256\t        lake_name = LAKE_NAME_BY_ID.get(lake_id, lake_id)\n   257\t        rows.append(\n   258\t            {\n   259\t                \"lake_id\": lake_id,\n   260\t                \"lake_name\": lake_name,\n   261\t                \"lake_type\": None,\n   262\t                \"location_id\": lake_name if lake_name in known_location_ids else None,\n   263\t                \"ward_id\": None,\n   264\t                \"latitude\": None,\n   265\t                \"longitude\": None,\n   266\t                \"catchment_area_sqkm\": None,\n   267\t                \"lake_area_sqkm\": None,\n   268\t                \"full_tank_level_meters\": None,\n   269\t                \"max_capacity_mcm\": None,\n   270\t                \"number_of_gates\": None,\n   271\t                \"source_name\": \"Documents_Metrosense\",\n   272\t            }\n   273\t        )\n   274\t    return rows\n   275\t\n   276\t\n   277\tdef _validate_location_coverage(location_rows: list[dict[str, Any]], refs: FactReferences) -> None:\n   278\t    canonical_ids = {row[\"location_id\"] for row in location_rows}\n   279\t    missing_locations = sorted(refs.location_ids - canonical_ids)\n   280\t    missing_wards = sorted(refs.ward_ids - canonical_ids)\n   281\t\n   282\t    if missing_locations or missing_wards:\n   283\t        detail = {\n   284\t            \"missing_location_ids\": missing_locations[:20],\n   285\t            \"missing_ward_ids\": missing_wards[:20],\n   286\t            \"missing_location_count\": len(missing_locations),\n   287\t            \"missing_ward_count\": len(missing_wards),\n   288\t        }\n   289\t        raise LoaderValidationError(\n   290\t            \"Location normalization failed coverage check: \" + json.dumps(detail, sort_keys=True)\n   291\t        )\n   292\t\n   293\t\n   294\tdef _transform_row(table_name: str, row: dict[str, str]) -> dict[str, Any]:\n   295\t    transformed: dict[str, Any] = {\n   296\t        key: (value if value != \"\" else None) for key, value in row.items()\n   297\t    }\n   298\t\n   299\t    if table_name == \"weather_observation\":\n   300\t        transformed[\"observed_at\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\"observed_at\"])\n   301\t        transformed[\"ingested_at\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\"ingested_at\"])\n   302\t        transformed[\"elevation_meters\"] = _to_float(row.get(\"elevation_meters\"))\n   303\t        transformed[\"temperature_celsius\"] = _to_float(row.get(\"temperature_celsius\"))\n   304\t        transformed[\"humidity_percent\"] = _to_float(row.get(\"humidity_percent\"))\n   305\t        transformed[\"pressure_hpa\"] = _to_float(row.get(\"pressure_hpa\"))\n   306\t        transformed[\"wind_speed_kmh\"] = _to_float(row.get(\"wind_speed_kmh\"))\n   307\t        transformed[\"wind_gust_kmh\"] = _to_float(row.get(\"wind_gust_kmh\"))\n   308\t        transformed[\"wind_direction_degrees\"] = _to_int(row.get(\"wind_direction_degrees\"))\n   309\t        transformed[\"rainfall_mm_hourly\"] = _to_float(row.get(\"rainfall_mm_hourly\"))\n   310\t        transformed[\"rainfall_mm_24hour\"] = _to_float(row.get(\"rainfall_mm_24hour\"))\n   311\t        transformed[\"rainfall_intensity_mm_hr\"] = _to_float(row.get(\"rainfall_intensity_mm_hr\"))\n   312\t        transformed[\"visibility_km\"] = _to_float(row.get(\"visibility_km\"))\n   313\t        transformed[\"latitude\"] = _to_float(row.get(\"latitude\"))\n   314\t        transformed[\"longitude\"] = _to_float(row.get(\"longitude\"))\n   315\t\n   316\t    elif table_name == \"air_quality_observation\":\n   317\t        transformed[\"observed_at\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\"observed_at\"])\n   318\t        transformed[\"ingested_at\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\"ingested_at\"])\n   319\t        for col in [\"pm2_5\", \"pm10\", \"no2\", \"so2\", \"co\", \"ozone\", \"nh3\", \"latitude\", \"longitude\"]:\n   320\t            transformed[col] = _to_float(row.get(col))\n   321\t        transformed[\"aqi_value\"] = _to_int(row.get(\"aqi_value\"))\n   322\t\n   323\t    elif table_name == \"lake_hydrology\":\n   324\t        transformed[\"observed_at\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\"observed_at\"])\n   325\t        transformed[\"ingested_at\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\"ingested_at\"])\n   326\t        for col in [\n   327\t            \"water_level_meters\",\n   328\t            \"fill_percentage\",\n   329\t            \"inflow_cusecs\",\n   330\t            \"outflow_cusecs\",\n   331\t            \"surplus_flow_cusecs\",\n   332\t            \"rainfall_last_1h_mm\",\n   333\t            \"rainfall_last_24h_mm\",\n   334\t        ]:\n   335\t            transformed[col] = _to_float(row.get(col))\n   336\t        transformed[\"overflow_status\"] = _to_bool(row.get(\"overflow_status\"))\n   337\t        transformed[\"encroachment_risk_flag\"] = _to_bool(row.get(\"encroachment_risk_flag\"))\n   338\t        transformed[\"siltation_risk_flag\"] = _to_bool(row.get(\"siltation_risk_flag\"))\n   339\t        transformed[\"number_of_gates_open\"] = _to_int(row.get(\"number_of_gates_open\"))\n   340\t\n   341\t    elif table_name == \"power_outage_event\":\n   342\t        transformed[\"started_at\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\"started_at\"])\n   343\t        transformed[\"restored_at\"] = _parse_timestamp(row.get(\"restored_at\"))\n   344\t        transformed[\"duration_minutes\"] = _to_int(row.get(\"duration_minutes\"))\n   345\t        transformed[\"affected_customers\"] = _to_int(row.get(\"affected_customers\"))\n   346\t        transformed[\"critical_load_affected_flag\"] = _to_bool(\n   347\t            row.get(\"critical_load_affected_flag\")\n   348\t        )\n   349\t        for col in [\n   350\t            \"wind_speed_kmh_at_time\",\n   351\t            \"wind_gust_kmh_at_time\",\n   352\t            \"rainfall_mm_1h_at_time\",\n   353\t            \"rainfall_mm_24h_at_time\",\n   354\t        ]:\n   355\t            transformed[col] = _to_float(row.get(col))\n   356\t\n   357\t    elif table_name == \"traffic_segment_observation\":\n   358\t        transformed[\"observed_at\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\"observed_at\"])\n   359\t        transformed[\"ingested_at\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\"ingested_at\"])\n   360\t        transformed[\"lanes_count\"] = _to_int(row.get(\"lanes_count\"))\n   361\t        for col in [\n   362\t            \"speed_limit_kmh\",\n   363\t            \"avg_speed_kmh\",\n   364\t            \"free_flow_speed_kmh\",\n   365\t            \"travel_time_minutes\",\n   366\t            \"free_flow_travel_time_minutes\",\n   367\t            \"delay_minutes\",\n   368\t            \"congestion_index\",\n   369\t            \"heavy_vehicle_share\",\n   370\t            \"rainfall_mm_1h_at_time\",\n   371\t            \"rainfall_mm_3h_at_time\",\n   372\t        ]:\n   373\t            transformed[col] = _to_float(row.get(col))\n   374\t        transformed[\"waterlogging_flag\"] = _to_bool(row.get(\"waterlogging_flag\"))\n   375\t\n   376\t    elif table_name == \"flood_incident\":\n   377\t        transformed[\"reported_at\"] = _parse_timestamp(row[\"reported_at\"])\n   378\t        transformed[\"resolved_at\"] = _parse_timestamp(row.get(\"resolved_at\"))\n   379\t        for col in [\n   380\t            \"latitude\",\n   381\t            \"longitude\",\n   382\t            \"water_depth_cm\",\n   383\t            \"rainfall_mm_1h_at_time\",\n   384\t            \"rainfall_mm_3h_at_time\",\n   385\t        ]:\n   386\t            transformed[col] = _to_float(row.get(col))\n   387\t        for col in [\n   388\t            \"road_blocked_flag\",\n   389\t            \"vehicles_stranded_flag\",\n   390\t            \"property_damage_flag\",\n   391\t            \"pump_deployed_flag\",\n   392\t        ]:\n   393\t            transformed[col] = _to_bool(row.get(col))\n   394\t\n   395\t    return transformed\n   396\t\n   397\t\n   398\tasync def _insert_rows(\n   399\t    conn: AsyncConnection,\n   400\t    table_name: str,\n   401\t    rows: list[dict[str, Any]],\n   402\t    batch_size: int = 5000,\n   403\t) -> int:\n   404\t    if not rows:\n   405\t        return 0\n   406\t\n   407\t    columns = list(rows[0].keys())\n   408\t    col_sql = \", \".join(columns)\n   409\t    value_sql = \", \".join(f\":{col}\" for col in columns)\n   410\t    statement = text(f\"INSERT INTO {table_name} ({col_sql}) VALUES ({value_sql})\")\n   411\t\n   412\t    inserted = 0\n   413\t    for start in range(0, len(rows), batch_size):\n   414\t        raw_batch = rows[start : start + batch_size]\n   415\t        batch: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\n   416\t        for row in raw_batch:\n   417\t            normalized_row: dict[str, Any] = {}\n   418\t            for key, value in row.items():\n   419\t                if isinstance(value, (list, dict)):\n   420\t                    normalized_row[key] = json.dumps(value)\n   421\t                else:\n   422\t                    normalized_row[key] = value\n   423\t            batch.append(normalized_row)\n   424\t        await conn.execute(statement, batch)\n   425\t        inserted += len(batch)\n   426\t    return inserted\n   427\t\n   428\t\n   429\tasync def _load_csv_table(\n   430\t    conn: AsyncConnection,\n   431\t    csv_name: str,\n   432\t    table_name: str,\n   433\t    batch_size: int = 5000,\n   434\t) -> int:\n   435\t    inserted = 0\n   436\t    batch: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\n   437\t\n   438\t    with (DATASET_DIR / csv_name).open(newline=\"\") as handle:\n   439\t        reader = csv.DictReader(handle)\n   440\t        for row in reader:\n   441\t            batch.append(_transform_row(table_name, row))\n   442\t            if len(batch) >= batch_size:\n   443\t                inserted += await _insert_rows(conn, table_name, batch, batch_size=batch_size)\n   444\t                batch = []\n   445\t\n   446\t    if batch:\n   447\t        inserted += await _insert_rows(conn, table_name, batch, batch_size=batch_size)\n   448\t\n   449\t    return inserted\n   450\t\n   451\t\n   452\tasync def run_loader(\n   453\t    replace: bool, simulate_failure_after_truncate: bool = False\n   454\t) -> dict[str, int]:\n   455\t    settings = get_settings()\n   456\t    engine = create_async_engine(settings.effective_db_url)\n   457\t\n   458\t    refs, ward_name_by_id, zone_name_by_ward_id = _collect_references()\n   459\t    location_rows = _build_location_rows(refs, ward_name_by_id, zone_name_by_ward_id)\n   460\t    _validate_location_coverage(location_rows, refs)\n   461\t    ward_profile_rows = _build_ward_profile_rows(refs.ward_ids)\n   462\t    lake_reference_rows = _build_lake_reference_rows(refs.lake_ids, refs.location_ids)\n   463\t\n   464\t    # Explicit diagnostics before SQL FKs fire to highlight normalization issues.\n   465\t    lake_reference_ids = {row[\"lake_id\"] for row in lake_reference_rows}\n   466\t    missing_lakes = sorted(refs.lake_ids - lake_reference_ids)\n   467\t    if missing_lakes:\n   468\t        raise LoaderValidationError(\n   469\t            f\"Missing lake_reference rows for lake_ids: {missing_lakes[:20]}\"\n   470\t        )\n   471\t\n   472\t    inserted_counts: defaultdict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\n   473\t\n   474\t    async with engine.begin() as conn:\n   475\t        await conn.execute(text(\"SET LOCAL TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata'\"))\n   476\t        if replace:\n   477\t            truncate_sql = \"TRUNCATE TABLE \" + \", \".join(DATASET_TABLE_ORDER) + \" RESTART IDENTITY\"\n   478\t            await conn.execute(text(truncate_sql))\n   479\t\n   480\t        if simulate_failure_after_truncate:\n   481\t            raise RuntimeError(\"Simulated loader failure after truncate\")\n   482\t\n   483\t        inserted_counts[\"location_master\"] = await _insert_rows(\n   484\t            conn,\n   485\t            \"location_master\",\n   486\t            location_rows,\n   487\t            batch_size=2000,\n   488\t        )\n   489\t        inserted_counts[\"ward_profile\"] = await _insert_rows(\n   490\t            conn,\n   491\t            \"ward_profile\",\n   492\t            ward_profile_rows,\n   493\t            batch_size=2000,\n   494\t        )\n   495\t        inserted_counts[\"lake_reference\"] = await _insert_rows(\n   496\t            conn,\n   497\t            \"lake_reference\",\n   498\t            lake_reference_rows,\n   499\t            batch_size=2000,\n   500\t        )\n   501\t\n   502\t        for csv_name, table_name in CSV_TABLES.items():\n   503\t            inserted_counts[table_name] = await _load_csv_table(conn, csv_name, table_name)\n   504\t\n   505\t    await engine.dispose()\n   506\t    return dict(inserted_counts)\n   507\t\n   508\t\n   509\tdef _parse_args() -> argparse.Namespace:\n   510\t    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\"Load MetroSense golden CSV dataset into Postgres\")\n   511\t    parser.add_argument(\n   512\t        \"--replace\",\n   513\t        action=\"store_true\",\n   514\t        help=\"Truncate dataset tables before loading so DB mirrors golden CSVs\",\n   515\t    )\n   516\t    parser.add_argument(\n   517\t        \"--simulate-failure-after-truncate\",\n   518\t        action=\"store_true\",\n   519\t        help=\"Crash after truncate to validate transaction rollback behavior\",\n   520\t    )\n     1\tfrom __future__ import annotations\n     2\t\n     3\tfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\n     4\tfrom typing import Any\n     5\t\n     6\tfrom sqlalchemy import (\n     7\t    JSON,\n     8\t    Boolean,\n     9\t    CheckConstraint,\n    10\t    DateTime,\n    11\t    Float,\n    12\t    ForeignKey,\n    13\t    Integer,\n    14\t    String,\n    15\t    Text,\n    16\t)\n    17\tfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column\n    18\t\n    19\tfrom app.db.base import Base\n    20\t\n    21\t\n    22\tdef _utcnow() -> datetime:\n    23\t    return datetime.now(UTC)\n    24\t\n    25\t\n    26\tclass User(Base):\n    27\t    __tablename__ = \"users\"\n    28\t\n    29\t    id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, primary_key=True)\n 65\t\n    66\t\n    67\tdef _write_golden_fixture(tmp_path: Path) -> tuple[Path, Path]:\n    68\t    dataset_dir = tmp_path / \"DataSet_MetroSense\"\n    69\t    docs_dir = tmp_path / \"Documents_Metrosense\"\n    70\t    dataset_dir.mkdir(parents=True)\n    71\t    docs_dir.mkdir(parents=True)\n    72\t\n    73\t    for name, body in CSV_FIXTURES.items():\n    74\t        (dataset_dir / name).write_text(body)\n    75\t\n    76\t    index_payload = {\n    77\t        \"document_id\": \"test-doc\",\n    78\t        \"wards_covered\": [\"Hebbal\", \"Bellandur\", \"Varthur\"],\n    79\t        \"table_of_contents\": [{\"wards_mentioned\": [\"Hebbal\", \"Nagavara\"]}],\n    80\t    }\n    81\t    (docs_dir / \"test_index.json\").write_text(json.dumps(index_payload))\n    82\t    return dataset_dir, docs_dir\n    83\t\n    84\t\n    85\t@pytest.mark.asyncio\n    86\tasync def test_loader_replace_and_idempotent(\n    87\t    db: AsyncSession, tmp_path: Path, monkeypatch: pytest.MonkeyPatch\n    88\t) -> None:\n    89\t    dataset_dir, docs_dir = _write_golden_fixture(tmp_path)\n    90\t    monkeypatch.setattr(loader, \"DATASET_DIR\", dataset_dir)\n    91\t    monkeypatch.setattr(loader, \"DOCUMENTS_DIR\", docs_dir)\n    92\t\n    93\t    first = await loader.run_loader(replace=True)\n    94\t    second = await loader.run_loader(replace=True)\n    95\t\n    96\t    assert first == second\n    97\t\n    98\t    row_count = (\n    99\t        await db.execute(text(\"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM air_quality_observation\"))\n   100\t    ).scalar_one()\n   101\t    assert row_count == 1\n   102\t\n   103\t    location_count = (await db.execute(text(\"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM location_master\"))).scalar_one()\n   104\t    assert location_count >= 3\n   105\t\n   106\t\n   107\t@pytest.mark.asyncio\n   108\tasync def test_loader_rollback_on_midrun_failure(\n   109\t    db: AsyncSession,\n   110\t    tmp_path: Path,\n   111\t    monkeypatch: pytest.MonkeyPatch,\n   112\t) -> None:\n   113\t    dataset_dir, docs_dir = _write_golden_fixture(tmp_path)\n   114\t    monkeypatch.setattr(loader, \"DATASET_DIR\", dataset_dir)\n   115\t    monkeypatch.setattr(loader, \"DOCUMENTS_DIR\", docs_dir)\n   116\t\n   117\t    await db.execute(\n   118\t        text(\n   119\t            \"\"\"\n   120\t            INSERT INTO location_master (\n   121\t                location_id, canonical_name, location_type, aliases,\n   122\t                ward_id, ward_name, zone_name, neighborhood_name,\n   123\t                pin_code, latitude, longitude, geometry, created_at, updated_at\n   124\t            ) VALUES (\n   125\t                'sentinel_loc', 'Sentinel Location', 'ward', '[]'::json,\n   126\t                NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL,\n   127\t                NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NOW(), NOW()\n   128\t            )\n   129\t            \"\"\"\n   130\t        )\n   131\t    )\n   132\t    await db.commit()\n   133\t\n   134\t    with pytest.raises(RuntimeError, match=\"Simulated loader failure\"):\n   135\t        await loader.run_loader(replace=True, simulate_failure_after_truncate=True)\n   136\t\n   137\t    sentinel = (\n   138\t        await db.execute(\n   139\t            text(\"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM location_master WHERE location_id = 'sentinel_loc'\")\n   140\t        )\n   141\t    ).scalar_one()\n   142\t    assert sentinel == 1\n   143\t\n   144\t\n   145\t@pytest.mark.asyncio\n   146\tasync def test_location_validation_reports_missing_ids() -> None:\n   147\t    refs = loader.FactReferences(location_ids={\"A\", \"B\"}, ward_ids={\"ward_1\"}, lake_ids=set())\n   148\t    valid = [{\"location_id\": \"A\"}, {\"location_id\": \"ward_1\"}]\n   149\t\n   150\t    with pytest.raises(loader.LoaderValidationError, match=\"missing_location_count\"):\n   151\t ## Entry 300
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-11T06:04:13.414Z
**Role/Type:** event_msg
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-11T06:04:13.414Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_message",
    "message": "Implemented. And yes—seeding now reads **directly from the CSV files** in `server/DataSet_MetroSense/`.\n\n- Added the full DB model set (existing `users` kept, plus the 12 MetroSense architecture tables) in `server/app/db/models.py:35`.\n- Added the new Alembic migration for the schema in `server/alembic/versions/20260311_0002_metrosense_schema.py:19`.\n- Added CSV-driven loader in `server/scripts/load_metrosense_dataset.py:452`:\n  - reads raw CSV rows directly (`csv.DictReader`) and type-converts per table,\n  - normalizes references, then validates location coverage before commit (`server/scripts/load_metrosense_dataset.py:277`),\n  - uses one transaction and supports simulated crash for rollback testing (`server/scripts/load_metrosense_dataset.py:480`),\n  - CLI: `uv run python scripts/load_metrosense_dataset.py --replace` (`server/scripts/load_metrosense_dataset.py:509`).\n- Added integration tests for:\n  - replace/idempotent load,\n  - mid-run failure rollback preserving pre-run DB state,\n  - explicit missing-location diagnostics  \n  in `server/tests/integration/test_metrosense_dataset_loader.py:85`.\n\nValidation I ran:\n- `uv run ruff check app/db/models.py scripts/load_metrosense_dataset.py tests/integration/test_metrosense_dataset_loader.py` ✅\n- `uv run mypy scripts/load_metrosense_dataset.py app/db/models.py tests/integration/test_metrosense_dataset_loader.py` ✅\n- `uv run pytest tests/integration/test_metrosense_dataset_loader.py -q` ✅ (3 passed)\n- `uv run pytest tests/unit -q` ✅\n- `uv run pytest tests/integration -q` ✅\n\nNotes:\n- Full-repo `ruff check .` still reports pre-existing unrelated issues in files I didn’t change.\n- I also noticed an unexpected untracked path `POQ/Backend/` in git status. I did not modify it.",
    "phase": "final_answer"
  }
}
```

And yes—seeding now reads **directly from the CSV files** in `server/DataSet_MetroSense/`.\n\n- Added the full DB model set (existing `users` kept, plus the 12 MetroSense architecture tables) in `server/app/db/models.py:35`.\n- Added the new Alembic migration for the schema in `server/alembic/versions/20260311_0002_metrosense_schema.py:19`.\n- Added CSV-driven loader in `server/scripts/load_metrosense_dataset.py:452`:\n  - reads raw CSV rows directly (`csv.DictReader`) and type-converts per table,\n  - normalizes references, then validates location coverage before commit (`server/scripts/load_metrosense_dataset.py:277`),\n  - uses one transaction and supports simulated crash for rollback testing (`server/scripts/load_metrosense_dataset.py:480`),\n  - CLI: `uv run python scripts/load_metrosense_dataset.py --replace` (`server/scripts/load_metrosense_dataset.py:509`).\n- Added integration tests for:\n  - replace/idempotent load,\n  - mid-run failure rollback preserving pre-run DB state,\n  - explicit missing-location diagnostics  \n  in `server/tests/integration/test_metrosense_dataset_loader.py:85`.\n\nValidation I ran:\n- `uv run ruff check app/db/models.py scripts/load_metrosense_dataset.py tests/integration/test_metrosense_dataset_loader.py` ✅\n- `uv run mypy scripts/load_metrosense_dataset.py app/db/models.py tests/integration/test_metrosense_dataset_loader.py` ✅\n- `uv run pytest tests/integration/test_metrosense_dataset_loader.py -q` ✅ (3 passed)\n- `uv run pytest tests/unit -q` ✅\n- `uv run pytest tests/integration -q` ✅\n\nNotes:\n- Full-repo `ruff check .` still reports pre-existing unrelated issues in files I didn’t change.\n- I also noticed an unexpected untracked path `POQ/Backend/` in git status.
